creator: m.tsatsenko@gmail.com
text:
I see. Let's update imspecor port rather than creating a new one. I will
send the patches when I get home. I only need advice how portversion should
be specified in that case.

Mikhail
23.06.2012 13:41 ÐÏÌØÚÏ×ÁÔÅÌØ "Michael Scheidell" <scheidell@freebsd.org>
ÎÁÐÉÓÁÌ:

> **
> ping:
>
> wo options, that I see:
> 1) why not just update net-im/imspector ? if upstream isn't working on it
> 2) if you really want a -devel branch, then you need to call for a
> repocopy, from net-im/imspector -> net-im/imspector-devel, and attach
> patches against the copy
> (we need to do the repocopy)
